pi_items.source: Standard Hubble Palette (SHO) maps SII (673nm) to Red, H-alpha (656nm) to Green, and OIII (502nm) to Blue, matching the FITS file headers and task requirements.
task description and export_result.sh check for this prefix

privileged_info_summary: The data consists of real astronomical FITS images downloaded from the ESA Hubble FITS Liberator Datasets. The FITS headers confirm the target is the Eagle Nebula (M16-A). The provided filters are F502N (O III), F656N (H-alpha), and F673N (S II). The task requires applying the standard Hubble Palette (SHO mapping), which correctly assigns 673nm to the Red channel, 656nm to the Green channel, and 502nm to the Blue channel. The expected output filename prefix is "eagle_nebula_hubble_palette".
